tasks.subject: Task 0: Schema + queries (per-app grants + FA scope vocabulary)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reshape PAT table to all_apps+app_grants, add oidc_client.forward_auth_scopes, adjust/extend sqlc queries; regenerate pkg/db.

**Verify:** `sqlc generate && go build -tags nodynamic ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["db/migrations/023_personal_access_token.sql", "db/migrations/024_forward_auth_scopes.sql", "db/queries/personal_access_token.sql", "db/queries/oidc.sql", "db/queries/rbac.sql", "pkg/db"], "verifyCommand": "sqlc generate && go build -tags nodynamic ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PAT table all_apps+app_grants", "oidc_client.forward_auth_scopes jsonb", "sqlc InsertPAT(AllApps,AppGrants)+RevokePATByID+SetForwardAuthScopes+FA ForwardAuthScopes"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Gateway per-app scope emission
tasks.description:
**Goal:** verifyForwardAuthPAT honors all_apps + per-app app_grants, emitting only the requested app's scopes.

**Verify:** `go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/ -run ForwardAuth -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth.go", "pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/ -run ForwardAuth -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all_apps → 200 empty scopes", "granted app → 200 with that app's scopes", "non-granted app → 403", "invalid/disabled → 401; RBAC-deny → 403"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Self-service reshape + /me/forward-auth-apps
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /me/tokens create takes allApps+appGrants (validated vs authorized apps + each app's vocabulary); view exposes them; GET /me/forward-auth-apps feeds the picker.

**Verify:** `go test ./pkg/server/ -run 'Token|MyForwardAuthApps' -v && go build -tags nodynamic ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/contract/auth.go", "pkg/server/handle_me_tokens.go", "pkg/server/server.go", "pkg/server/handle_me_tokens_test.go", "pkg/db"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/server/ -run 'Token|MyForwardAuthApps' -v && go build -tags nodynamic ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["create validates app⊆authorized + scope⊆vocab", "least-priv + all_apps-vs-grants conflicts → bad_request", "/me/forward-auth-apps returns authorized apps + vocab", "views expose allApps+appGrants, no secret"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Admin per-app scope vocabulary on FA apps
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Admins set each FA app's forward_auth_scopes vocabulary via create/update; round-trips through the view; names validated.

**Verify:** `go test ./pkg/server/ -run ForwardAuthApp -v && go build -tags nodynamic ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/contract/auth.go", "pkg/server/handle_admin_forward_auth_apps.go", "pkg/server/handle_admin_forward_auth_apps_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/server/ -run ForwardAuthApp -v && go build -tags nodynamic ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["create/update round-trip scopes", "invalid/duplicate name → bad_request", "view includes scopes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Admin oversight — list/revoke a user's PATs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Admins can list and revoke any account's PATs.

**Verify:** `go test ./pkg/server/ -run AccountTokens -v && go build -tags nodynamic ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/handle_admin_account_tokens.go", "pkg/server/handle_admin_account_tokens_test.go", "pkg/contract/auth.go", "pkg/server/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/server/ -run AccountTokens -v && go build -tags nodynamic ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET /accounts/{id}/tokens lists, no secret", "admin+sudo revoke by id + audit actor=admin", "unknown id → not-found"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Dashboard PAT create picker + per-app list
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PAT create dialog lets the user pick apps + per-app scopes (least-privilege default); list shows per-app grants.

**Verify:** `cd dashboard && npm run build && npm test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/pages/TokensView.vue", "dashboard/src/locales/en.ts", "dashboard/src/locales/zh.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npm run build && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["app+per-app-scope checkbox picker from /me/forward-auth-apps", "all-apps switch + least-priv submit gate", "list renders per-app grants; en/zh parity"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Dashboard admin scope-vocabulary editor + trust alerts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Admins edit each FA app's scope vocabulary; the FA admin pages carry the deployment trust warnings.

**Verify:** `cd dashboard && npm run build && npm test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminForwardAuthAppDetailView.vue", "dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminForwardAuthAppsView.vue", "dashboard/src/locales/en.ts", "dashboard/src/locales/zh.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npm run build && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["scope-vocabulary editor round-trips via FA PUT", "trust warning Alert (isolation/headers/strip-auth)", "en/zh parity"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Dashboard admin account PATs card
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The admin account-detail page lists and revokes the account's PATs.

**Verify:** `cd dashboard && npm run build && npm test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminAccountDetailView.vue", "dashboard/src/locales/en.ts", "dashboard/src/locales/zh.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npm run build && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PATs card lists account PATs + revokes via withSudo", "en/zh parity"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Docs — per-app model + admin oversight
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update the docs to the per-app PAT model and the new surfaces.

**Verify:** `grep -n 'appGrants' docs/forward-auth.md api.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/forward-auth.md", "api.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'appGrants' docs/forward-auth.md api.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["forward-auth.md per-app model + trust-boundary kept", "api.md create body + /me/forward-auth-apps + FA scopes + admin oversight"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Smoke + full gate + dist
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove the per-app PAT path end-to-end and confirm the full gate is green with a committed bundle.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Re-validate every acceptanceCriteria with captured output; do not substitute a cheaper check.

**Verify:** `mise run ci && mise run ci:smoke` → both exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/smoke/main.go", "pkg/webui/dist"], "verifyCommand": "mise run ci && mise run ci:smoke", "acceptanceCriteria": ["smoke: granted app 200 + Remote-Scopes; all_apps 200 empty; non-granted 403", "smoke: admin list + revoke → re-verify 401", "mise run ci exits 0 (no dist drift)", "mise run ci:smoke exits 0"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
